mapper.sql: select id, report_no, user_id, patient_name, gender, age, visit_type, basic_disease, allergy_history_type, allergy_history_detail, past_history_type, past_history_detail, current_medication_type, current_medication_detail, chief_complaint, duration, severity_level, sudden_worse, life_impact, highest_risk_level, status, doctor_id, doctor_name, doctor_advice, doctor_summary, suggested_department, need_offline_visit, need_supplement, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from tcm_consult_report
mapper.insert: insert into tcm_consult_report ( report_no, user_id, patient_name, gender, age, visit_type, basic_disease, allergy_history_type, allergy_history_detail, past_history_type, past_history_detail, current_medication_type, current_medication_detail, chief_complaint, duration, severity_level, sudden_worse, life_impact, highest_risk_level, status, doctor_id, doctor_name, doctor_advice, doctor_summary, suggested_department, need_offline_visit, need_supplement, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag ) values ( #{reportNo}, #{userId}, #{patientName}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{visitType}, #{basicDisease}, #{allergyHistoryType}, #{allergyHistoryDetail}, #{pastHistoryType}, #{pastHistoryDetail}, #{currentMedicationType}, #{currentMedicationDetail}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{duration}, #{severityLevel}, #{suddenWorse}, #{lifeImpact}, #{highestRiskLevel}, #{status}, #{doctorId}, #{doctorName}, #{doctorAdvice}, #{doctorSummary}, #{suggestedDepartment}, #{needOfflineVisit}, #{needSupplement}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag} )
mapper.select: select count(1) from tcm_consult_report where del_flag = '0' and date(create_time) = curdate()
select count(1) from tcm_consult_report where del_flag = '0' and highest_risk_level in ('high', 'critical') and status in ('pending', 'processing', 'supplement_required')
select count(1) from tcm_consult_report where del_flag = '0' and highest_risk_level = 'critical' and status in ('pending', 'processing', 'supplement_required')

where del_flag = '0' and highest_risk_level in ('high', 'critical') and status in ('pending', 'processing', 'supplement_required') order by case highest_risk_level when 'critical' then 1 when 'high' then 2 else 3 end, create_time desc, id desc limit #{limit}

select date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, count(1) as reportCount, sum(case when highest_risk_level in ('high', 'critical') then 1 else 0 end) as highRiskCount from tcm_consult_report where del_flag = '0' and create_time >= #{startTime} group by date_format(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by statDate asc

select d.disease_name as diseaseName, count(1) as diseaseCount from tcm_consult_report_disease d inner join tcm_consult_report r on r.id = d.report_id where r.del_flag = '0' and r.create_time >= #{startTime} and d.disease_name is not null and d.disease_name != '' group by d.disease_name order by diseaseCount desc, d.disease_name asc limit #{limit}
